name: Simple Shapes
description: Sample dataset of 32x32 geometric shapes for diffusion model training. Each sample defines a shape, color, and background that the pipeline renders to pixel data at runtime.

samples.prompt: a red circle on white background
a blue square on white background
a green triangle on white background
a yellow circle on black background
a purple square on gray background
an orange triangle on dark background
a white circle on blue background
a cyan square on dark background
a red triangle on green background
a pink circle on white background
